release_prerequisites.notes: Milestone M7 stays blocked until the qualification corpus is truthfully closed over retained evidence.
Release sign-off requires the reviewed complex, singular, phase-space, linear, D0/fixed-eps, and user-hook runtime surfaces to be closed under Milestone M5 before M7 can proceed.
Use already-retained goldens, promoted manifests, and comparison summaries instead of planning a new reference-capture model inside M7.

review_sections.notes: Do not mark complete until Milestone M6 is already truthfully closed.

required_outputs: explicit unstable or unreviewed performance carve-outs
review_sections.notes: This is a release-readiness review, not a new benchmark-capture lane.

required_inputs: required failure-code set from the parity matrix
required_outputs: explicit missing or degraded diagnostic paths
review_sections.notes: Keep explicit typed-failure expectations visible through release sign-off.
Docs must match the reviewed evidence surface rather than the requested end state.

required_outputs: explicit withheld-claim list if sign-off is still blocked
review_sections.notes: The sign-off statement belongs after the earlier sections have already passed.

docs_completion_targets.expectation: Matches the reviewed runtime and harness surface without widening claims.
Records the reviewed evidence packet, verification commands, and residual caveats.
States the exact qualification and release gates still in force.
Keeps the retained-reference lane and later M6/M7 consumers aligned.
Keeps the user-facing harness guide aligned with the retained-reference lane and later M6/M7 consumers.
Preserves milestone ordering and explicit blocker language for M6 and M7.

explicit_non_claims: Editing this scaffold does not claim Milestone M6 closure.
